gameTitle: Final Fantasy IV: The Complete Collection

achievements.title: [FF4] Misty Dismay
achievements.description: Defeat the Mist Dragon without it turning to Mist form more than once
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Team Leader
achievements.description: Defeat the General before any of the Baron Soldier's
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] The Snack That Snaps Back
achievements.description: Defeat the Antlion without triggering it's counter attack
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] All For One
achievements.description: Defeat all six bombs at once during Mom Bomb fight
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] You Require Much Training
achievements.description: Be seduced by a dancer and turned into a pig
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] You, Take This!
achievements.description: Have a Black Mage turn you into a Toad
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Let Me In!
achievements.description: Gain access to the Baron Weapon & Armor Shops
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Nothing Left
achievements.description: Defeat Baigan while only killing his arms once
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Nothing's Gonna save You from the Tidal Wave
achievements.description: Defeat Cagnazzo without getting hit from a Tidal Wave
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Spoony Bard Saves the Day
achievements.description: Defeat the Dark Elf in Lodestone Cavern
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] All Alone He Turns to Stone
achievements.description: Defeat Barbariccia without anyone becoming Petrified
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Brina
achievements.description: Defeat the Calca's and Brina's before they merge
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] The Doctor Will See You Now
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Not So Fast!
achievements.description: Defeat the Demon Wall without it moving forward more than 7 times
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Cecil's Trial
achievements.description: Unlock Cecil's Trial by having him with you while defeating Zeromus
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Cid's Trial
achievements.description: Unlock Cid's Trial by having him with you while defeating Zeromus
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Edge's Trial
achievements.description: Unlock Edge's Trial by having him with you while defeating Zeromus
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Edward's Trial
achievements.description: Unlock Edward's Trial by having him with you while defeating Zeromus
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Kain's Trial
achievements.description: Unlock Kain's Trial by having him with you while defeating Zeromus
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Palom or Porom's Trial
achievements.description: Unlock Palom or Porom's Trial by having him with you while defeating Zeromus
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Rosa's Trial
achievements.description: Unlock Rosa's Trial by having her with you while defeating Zeromus
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Rydia's Trial
achievements.description: Unlock Rydia's Trial by having her with you while defeating Zeromus
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] Yang's Trial
achievements.description: Unlock Yang's Trial by having him with you while defeating Zeromus
achievements.author: SnowPin

achievements.title: [FF4] At Least It's Not a Spoon
achievements.author: SnowPin
